query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A high-angle view of a residential courtyard at night. A multi-story apartment building with illuminated windows and balconies occupies the left side of the frame. Below, several cars are parked in a lot next to a grassy area with a tall street lamp in the foreground. Additional street lamps line a path leading toward a dark treeline on the horizon. The sky is deep blue, and distant lights are visible through a layer of evening haze.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A blurred, soft-focus high-angle view of a residential courtyard at night, rendered with a dreamlike haze. A multi-story apartment building on the left features overexposed windows and balconies that flare into bright orange light. Below, several cars are parked in a dimly lit lot beside a grassy area with a tall street lamp in the foreground. Sodium-vapor streetlamps cast a sickly orange glow across the wet pavement and grass, while deep shadows swallow detail. The heavy atmospheric haze, crushed blacks, and blown highlights create an oppressive, melancholic mood.
